rdf:Description.dc:description: Mesh convergence efficiency frontier for the OptumGX 3D-FE model (manuscript submitted Fig 5). Eight mesh refinements from 2k to 30k elements, with relative error to the finest mesh (N=30k) on the y-axis and computation time on the x-axis. Reference lines mark 1 % and 0.5 % error thresholds; error drops below 1 % at N=15k and below 0.5 % at N=20k. Each point is annotated with its element count.
